---
title: "Kedar_TowerLab"
output:
  word_document: default
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
date: "2026-01-20"
---

```{r}
# Load packages

library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(Matrix)
library(tidyr)
library(biomaRt)
library(nichenetr)
library(ggplot2)
library(pheatmap)
library(latexpdf)

# Load NicheNet models

nichenet_ligand_target_matrix <- readRDS("C:/Users/saniy/Downloads/nichenet_models/ligand_target_matrix.rds")
nichenet_lr_network <- readRDS("C:/Users/saniy/Downloads/nichenet_models/lr_network.rds")
weighted_networks <- readRDS("C:/Users/saniy/Downloads/nichenet_models/weighted_networks.rds")

```



```{r}
# 1. Function to read 10X GSM

read_gsm_10x <- function(matrix_file, feature_file, barcode_file, project_name) {
  mat <- readMM(matrix_file)
  features <- read.delim(feature_file, header = FALSE)
  barcodes <- read.delim(barcode_file, header = FALSE)
  
  rownames(mat) <- make.unique(features$V2)  # gene symbols
  colnames(mat) <- barcodes$V1
  
  seurat_obj <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = mat, project = project_name)
  seurat_obj[["ensembl_id"]] <- features$V1  # optional
  return(seurat_obj)
}

```


```{r}
# 2. Load datasets

bm <- read_gsm_10x(
  "C:/Users/saniy/Downloads/GSE221134_RAW/GSM6845846_BM_matrix.mtx.gz",
  "C:/Users/saniy/Downloads/GSE221134_RAW/GSM6845846_BM_features.tsv.gz",
  "C:/Users/saniy/Downloads/GSE221134_RAW/GSM6845846_BM_barcodes.tsv.gz",
  "BM"
)
bm$compartment <- "BM"

bl <- read_gsm_10x(
  "C:/Users/saniy/Downloads/GSE221134_RAW/GSM6845847_BL_matrix.mtx.gz",
  "C:/Users/saniy/Downloads/GSE221134_RAW/GSM6845847_BL_features.tsv.gz",
  "C:/Users/saniy/Downloads/GSE221134_RAW/GSM6845847_BL_barcodes.tsv.gz",
  "Blood"
)
bl$compartment <- "Blood"

ho <- read_gsm_10x(
  "C:/Users/saniy/Downloads/GSE221134_RAW/GSM6845848_HO_matrix.mtx.gz",
  "C:/Users/saniy/Downloads/GSE221134_RAW/GSM6845848_HO_features.tsv.gz",
  "C:/Users/saniy/Downloads/GSE221134_RAW/GSM6845848_HO_barcodes.tsv.gz",
  "Injury"
)
ho$compartment <- "Injury"

```


```{r}
# 3. SCTransform normalization

bm <- SCTransform(bm, verbose = FALSE)
bl <- SCTransform(bl, verbose = FALSE)
ho <- SCTransform(ho, verbose = FALSE)
```


```{r}
# 4. PCA, clustering, UMAP

datasets <- list(BM = bm, Blood = bl, Injury = ho)
for (name in names(datasets)) {
  obj <- datasets[[name]]
  obj <- RunPCA(obj, verbose = FALSE)
  obj <- FindNeighbors(obj, dims = 1:30)
  obj <- FindClusters(obj, resolution = 0.5)
  obj <- RunUMAP(obj, dims = 1:30)
  datasets[[name]] <- obj
}
bm <- datasets$BM; bl <- datasets$Blood; ho <- datasets$Injury

```

```{r}
# 5. Find cluster markers

find_markers_upper <- function(obj) {
  markers <- FindAllMarkers(obj, only.pos = TRUE, min.pct = 0.25, logfc.threshold = 0.25)
  markers <- markers %>%
    mutate(cluster = as.character(cluster),
           gene = toupper(gene))
  return(markers)
}

bm.markers <- find_markers_upper(bm)
bl.markers <- find_markers_upper(bl)
ho.markers <- find_markers_upper(ho)
```


```{r}
# 6. Rename Idents for clarity

# BM
Idents(bm) <- bm$seurat_clusters
bm <- RenameIdents(bm,
                   `0`="Neutrophil_inflam",`1`="Neutrophil",`2`="Neutrophil_prog",`3`="Neutrophil_early",
                   `4`="Macrophage", `5`="Cycling_cells",`6`="Myeloid_activated",`7`="HSPC",`8`="Myeloid",
                   `9`="B_cell",`10`="pDC")
bm$celltype <- Idents(bm)

# BL
Idents(bl) <- bl$seurat_clusters
bl <- RenameIdents(bl,
                   `0`="Neutrophil",`1`="B_cell",`2`="Monocyte_Macrophage", `3`="T_cell_CD4",
                   `4`="T_cell_CD8", `5`="T_reg",`6`="NK_cell",`7`="Inflammatory_Myeloid",
                   `8`="Myeloid_APC_like",`9`="Mast_cell",`10`="Cycling_lymphoid",`11` = "B_cell")
bl$celltype <- Idents(bl)

# HO
Idents(ho) <- ho$seurat_clusters
ho <- RenameIdents(ho,
                   `0`="Macrophage_resident",`1`="Fibroblast",`2`="Myeloid_APC_like",
                   `3`="Neutrophil", `4`="Macrophage_APC",`5`="High_mito_macrophage",
                   `6`="IFN_activated_myeloid",`7`="Endothelial",`8`="Dendritic_cell",
                   `9`="Epithelial_like",`10`="IFN_response",`11`="Proliferating_cells",
                   `12`="Smooth_muscle",`13`="Mesenchymal",`14`="Schwann_cell")
ho$celltype <- Idents(ho)

```


```{r}
# 6. UMAP visualization

DimPlot(bm, reduction = "umap", group.by = "celltype", label = TRUE) +
  ggtitle("BM: Annotated Cell Types")

DimPlot(bl, reduction = "umap", group.by = "celltype", label = TRUE) +
  ggtitle("Blood: Annotated Cell Types")

DimPlot(ho, reduction = "umap", group.by = "celltype", label = TRUE) +
  ggtitle("Injury: Annotated Cell Types")

```


```{r}
# 7. FeaturePlots for known markers

neutrophil_markers <- c("S100a8", "S100a9", "Ly6G", "Ctss", "Fcgr3b")
macrophage_markers <- c("C1qa", "C1qb", "C1qc", "Lyz2", "Ctsd")

FeaturePlot(bm, features = neutrophil_markers, reduction = "umap", ncol = 3)
FeaturePlot(bm, features = macrophage_markers, reduction = "umap", ncol = 3)

FeaturePlot(bl, features = neutrophil_markers, reduction = "umap", ncol = 3)
FeaturePlot(bl, features = macrophage_markers, reduction = "umap", ncol = 3)

FeaturePlot(ho, features = neutrophil_markers, reduction = "umap", ncol = 3)
FeaturePlot(ho, features = macrophage_markers, reduction = "umap", ncol = 3)
```


```{r}
#7a. Dot Plot Vizualisations

DotPlot(
  bm,
  features = c(neutrophil_markers, macrophage_markers),
  group.by = "celltype"
) + RotatedAxis() +
  ggtitle("BM: Canonical Marker Expression")

DotPlot(
  bl,
  features = c(neutrophil_markers, macrophage_markers),
  group.by = "celltype"
) + RotatedAxis() +
  ggtitle("Blood: Canonical Marker Expression")

DotPlot(
  ho,
  features = c(neutrophil_markers, macrophage_markers),
  group.by = "celltype"
) + RotatedAxis() +
  ggtitle("Injury: Canonical Marker Expression")
```

```{r}
# 8. Broad cluster labels for NicheNet

bm$celltype_broad <- ifelse(bm$celltype %in% c("Neutrophil_inflam","Neutrophil_prog","Neutrophil_early"), "Neutrophil",
                            ifelse(bm$celltype %in% c("Macrophage","Myeloid_activated"), "Macrophage", bm$celltype))
bl$celltype_broad <- ifelse(bl$celltype %in% c("Neutrophil"), "Neutrophil",
                            ifelse(bl$celltype %in% c("Monocyte_Macrophage","Inflammatory_Myeloid","Myeloid_APC_like"), "Macrophage", bl$celltype))
ho$celltype_broad <- ifelse(ho$celltype %in% c("Neutrophil"), "Neutrophil",
                            ifelse(ho$celltype %in% c("Macrophage_resident","Macrophage_APC","High_mito_macrophage","IFN_activated_myeloid"), "Macrophage", ho$celltype))
```


```{r}
# 9. Subset only relevant clusters 
Idents(bm) <- bm$celltype_broad 
Idents(bl) <- bl$celltype_broad 
Idents(ho) <- ho$celltype_broad 

# BM
bm_nm <- subset(bm, idents = c("Neutrophil", "Macrophage"), invert = FALSE) 
Idents(bm_nm) <- bm_nm$celltype_broad 

# BL 
bl_nm <- subset(bl, idents = c("Neutrophil", "Macrophage"), invert = FALSE) 
Idents(bl_nm) <- bl_nm$celltype_broad 

# HO 
ho_nm <- subset(ho, idents = c("Neutrophil", "Macrophage"), invert = FALSE) 
Idents(ho_nm) <- ho_nm$celltype_broad
```

```{R}
# 10. Add broad cluster labels to markers tables

# BM markers
bm.markers$cluster_broad <- as.character(bm.markers$cluster)
bm.markers$cluster_broad[bm.markers$cluster_broad %in% c("4", "6")] <- "Macrophage"
bm.markers$cluster_broad[bm.markers$cluster_broad %in% c("0","1","2","3")] <- "Neutrophil"

# BL markers
bl.markers$cluster_broad <- as.character(bl.markers$cluster)
bl.markers$cluster_broad[bl.markers$cluster_broad %in% c("2","7","8")] <- "Macrophage"
bl.markers$cluster_broad[bl.markers$cluster_broad %in% c("0")] <- "Neutrophil"

# HO markers
ho.markers$cluster_broad <- as.character(ho.markers$cluster)
ho.markers$cluster_broad[ho.markers$cluster_broad %in% c("0","4","5","6")] <- "Macrophage"
ho.markers$cluster_broad[ho.markers$cluster_broad %in% c("3")] <- "Neutrophil"
```



```{r}
# 11. Load mouse to human mapping


## Since our dataset has mouse genes I used the ensembl bioMart website to convert these into human orthologs along with the ENSMUG ids to be used for NicheNet analysis.

mouse2human_table <- read.delim(
  "C:/Users/saniy/Downloads/nichenet_models/mouse2human.txt",
  header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

mouse <- useMart("ensembl", dataset = "mmusculus_gene_ensembl")
mouse_symbols <- getBM(
  attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "mgi_symbol"),
  filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
  values = mouse2human_table$Gene.stable.ID,
  mart = mouse
)

mouse2human_symbols <- merge(
  mouse2human_table, mouse_symbols,
  by.x = "Gene.stable.ID", by.y = "ensembl_gene_id"
)

mouse2human_map <- setNames(mouse2human_symbols$Human.gene.name, mouse2human_symbols$mgi_symbol)
mouse2human_map <- mouse2human_map[!duplicated(names(mouse2human_map))]
```


```{r}
# 12. Function to create humanized SCT assay

create_human_assay <- function(seurat_obj, assay_name = "SCT_human", map_vector) {
  counts_mat <- GetAssayData(seurat_obj, assay = "SCT", layer = "counts")
  counts_mat <- as(counts_mat, "dgCMatrix")
  keep_genes <- intersect(rownames(counts_mat), names(map_vector))
  counts_mat_sub <- counts_mat[keep_genes, , drop = FALSE]
  rownames(counts_mat_sub) <- map_vector[keep_genes]
  counts_mat_sub <- counts_mat_sub[rownames(counts_mat_sub) != "", , drop = FALSE]
  counts_mat_sub <- counts_mat_sub[!duplicated(rownames(counts_mat_sub)), , drop = FALSE]
  seurat_obj[[assay_name]] <- CreateAssayObject(counts = counts_mat_sub)
  DefaultAssay(seurat_obj) <- assay_name
  return(seurat_obj)
}

bm_nm <- create_human_assay(bm_nm, "SCT_human", mouse2human_map)
bl_nm <- create_human_assay(bl_nm, "SCT_human", mouse2human_map)
ho_nm <- create_human_assay(ho_nm, "SCT_human", mouse2human_map)
```


```{R}
# 13.Function for doing cell-cell communication analysis using NicheNet 

run_nichenet <- function(
    seurat_obj,
    sender_clusters,
    receiver_cluster,
    markers_table,
    top_n = 50,
    use_receptor_filter = FALSE  # keep all ligands by default
) {
  
  cat("\n=== Running Flexible NicheNet for receiver cluster:", receiver_cluster, "===\n")
  
  # Identify sender and receiver cells
  sender_cells <- WhichCells(seurat_obj, idents = sender_clusters)
  receiver_cells <- WhichCells(seurat_obj, idents = receiver_cluster)
  
  cat("Sender cells:", length(sender_cells),
      "| Receiver cells:", length(receiver_cells), "\n")
  
  if(length(sender_cells) == 0 | length(receiver_cells) == 0) {
    stop("No cells found for sender or receiver clusters.")
  }
  expr_mat <- GetAssayData(seurat_obj, assay = DefaultAssay(seurat_obj), layer = "counts")
  expressed_genes_sender <- rownames(expr_mat)[Matrix::rowMeans(expr_mat[, sender_cells, drop = FALSE] > 0) > 0]
  expressed_genes_receiver <- rownames(expr_mat)[Matrix::rowMeans(expr_mat[, receiver_cells, drop = FALSE] > 0) > 0]
  
  cat("Expressed genes — sender:", length(expressed_genes_sender),
      "| receiver:", length(expressed_genes_receiver), "\n")
  
  # Ligand–receptor pairs
  if(use_receptor_filter) {
    potential_ligands <- nichenet_lr_network %>%
      dplyr::filter(from %in% expressed_genes_sender,
                    to %in% expressed_genes_receiver) %>%
      dplyr::select(from, to)
  } else {
    potential_ligands <- nichenet_lr_network %>%
      dplyr::filter(from %in% expressed_genes_sender) %>%
      dplyr::select(from, to)
  }
  
  cat("Total ligand-receptor pairs for sender clusters:", nrow(potential_ligands), "\n")
  
  if(nrow(potential_ligands) == 0) {
    warning("No ligand-receptor pairs found. Returning NULL.")
    return(NULL)
  }
  all_markers <- markers_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(cluster_broad == receiver_cluster) %>%  # use cluster_broad instead of cluster
    dplyr::pull(gene)
  geneset_receiver <- intersect(all_markers, expressed_genes_receiver)
  
  if(length(geneset_receiver) > top_n) {
    geneset_receiver <- geneset_receiver[1:top_n]
  }
  
  cat("Receiver gene set size (after filtering to expressed):", length(geneset_receiver), "\n")
  
  # Ligand activity prediction (only if >=2 genes)
  if(length(geneset_receiver) < 2) {
    warning("Receiver gene set too small for ligand activity prediction. Skipping AUROC.")
    ligand_activities <- NULL
    top_ligands <- NULL
  } else {
    ligand_activities <- predict_ligand_activities(
      geneset = geneset_receiver,
      background_expressed_genes = expressed_genes_receiver,
      ligand_target_matrix = nichenet_ligand_target_matrix,
      potential_ligands = unique(potential_ligands$from)
    )
    
    top_ligands <- ligand_activities %>%
      dplyr::arrange(desc(pearson)) %>%
      dplyr::rename(ligand = test_ligand) %>%
      dplyr::select(ligand, pearson) %>%
      head(10)
    
    cat("Top ligands:\n")
    print(top_ligands)
  }
  
  # Return full results
  return(list(
    expressed_genes_sender = expressed_genes_sender,
    expressed_genes_receiver = expressed_genes_receiver,
    potential_ligand_pairs = potential_ligands,
    geneset_receiver = geneset_receiver,
    ligand_activities = ligand_activities,
    top_ligands = top_ligands
  ))
}

```


```{R}
# 14. Run NicheNet with broad clusters

bm_results_safe <- run_nichenet(
  seurat_obj = bm_nm,
  sender_clusters = "Neutrophil",
  receiver_cluster = "Macrophage",
  markers_table = bm.markers,
  top_n = 20,
  use_receptor_filter = FALSE
)

bl_results_safe <- run_nichenet(
  seurat_obj = bl_nm,
  sender_clusters = "Neutrophil",
  receiver_cluster = "Macrophage",
  markers_table = bl.markers,
  top_n = 20,
  use_receptor_filter = FALSE
)

ho_results_safe <- run_nichenet(
  seurat_obj = ho_nm,
  sender_clusters = "Neutrophil",
  receiver_cluster = "Macrophage",
  markers_table = ho.markers,
  top_n = 20,
  use_receptor_filter = FALSE
)
```


```{r}
# 15. Adding Tissue info to the results 

bm_ligands <- bm_results_safe$top_ligands %>% mutate(Tissue = "BM") 
bl_ligands <- bl_results_safe$top_ligands %>% mutate(Tissue = "Blood") 
ho_ligands <- ho_results_safe$top_ligands %>% mutate(Tissue = "Injury") 

all_ligands <- bind_rows(bm_ligands, bl_ligands, ho_ligands) 

ligand_summary <- all_ligands %>% 
  dplyr::select(Tissue, ligand, pearson) %>% 
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = Tissue, values_from = pearson, values_fill = 0) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(BM)) 

ligand_summary
```

```{r}
# 16. Analysis fo compartment specific ligands

# Shared ligands (present in all compartments)
#shared_ligands <- ligand_summary %>% filter(Ligand_presence == 3)

# Compartment-specific ligands
bm_specific <- ligand_summary %>% filter(BM > 0 & Blood == 0 & Injury == 0)
blood_specific <- ligand_summary %>% filter(Blood > 0 & BM == 0 & Injury == 0)
injury_specific <- ligand_summary %>% filter(Injury > 0 & BM == 0 & Blood == 0)
```


```{r}
# 17. Pheatmap of ligand activity across compartments
ligand_mat <- as.matrix(ligand_summary[,2:4])
rownames(ligand_mat) <- ligand_summary$ligand

pheatmap(ligand_mat, cluster_rows = TRUE, cluster_cols = FALSE,
         main = "Neutrophil → Macrophage Ligand Activities Across Compartments")
```


```{r}
#18. Ranking the ligands across compartments for better vizualisation

ligand_summary_rank <- all_ligands %>%
  group_by(Tissue) %>%
  arrange(desc(pearson)) %>%
  mutate(rank = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()

top_ligands_all <- ligand_summary_rank %>%
  group_by(ligand) %>%
  filter(any(rank <= 10)) %>%
  ungroup()

# Plot rank of each ligand across tissues
ggplot(top_ligands_all, aes(x = Tissue, y = rank, group = ligand, color = ligand)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_y_reverse(breaks = 1:10) +  # Rank 1 on top
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Neutrophil → Macrophage ligand activity across compartments",
    y = "Rank (top ligands)",
    x = "Tissue",
    color = "Ligand"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )
```
